query: severely underexposed dark photo crushed shadows black murky
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: exposure extremes — severe underexposure, crushed shadows, dark murky atmosphere, mood-driven black tones

response.objective_caption: A dark grayscale photograph showing a rounded horizontal form with two recessed areas highlighted by thin bright edges in the upper left, positioned above a flat, horizontally textured surface in the lower portion. The palette ranges from deep charcoal to pale gray with smooth tonal transitions throughout.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract grayscale photograph where an unrecognizable rounded form with hollowed sections appears in the upper left, its surfaces smeared and lacking any fine detail or texture. The image exhibits bad or no details throughout, with structures dissolving into mushy ambiguity. Oppressive low contrast crushes midtones and creates a suffocating atmosphere with weak separation between light and dark, while the composition functions as an abstract photo that abandons representational clarity entirely.
